steps.title: Find the slope of line k, then flip-and-negate for perpendicular
steps.content: Line $k$: $x + y = 0 \Rightarrow y = -x$, so slope $= -1$. Perpendicular slope is the negative reciprocal: $-\frac{1}{-1} = 1$.

steps.title: Write line j and convert to standard form
steps.content: Line $j$ has slope $1$ and passes through $(0, 5)$, so $y = x + 5$. Rearranging: $x - y = -5$. The correct answer is choice D.
